title: ControlDeviceConfig
description:
ControlDeviceConfig

Control Device Configuration

The following is the procedure to set the control device to "Remote I/O".

(1)   Select [Controller] from the [Setup] menu-[System Configuration] and display the [System Configuration] dialog box. Select [Controller]-[Configuration].

Select "Remote I/O" in the [Control Device] box.

(2)   Click the [Apply] button to save the new settings, and then click the [Close] button.

For details on the dialog setting, refer to section 5.13.2 [System Configuration] (Setup menu) - [Setup]-[System Configuration]-[Configuration].
